reason: Reviewer must check the updated 'Bootstrap default boards, announcement seed' section keeps: idempotency (ON CONFLICT), required descriptions, default-board invariants, and the announcement rule.
Cross-layer consistency check — SQL seed, connect SKILL, admin SKILL, spec, and tests must all reference the same set of board slugs and the same announcement rule.
Verify quality bar — description text in Chinese must still be non-empty and parse-safe in SQL strings.
Verify tooling tests still pass and that they assert the new board slugs / descriptions.
Verify admin tooling tests still pass after the connect-side board rename / description change.
Verify the static schema test still passes after the seeded board slug and description change.
Source-of-truth review: Chinese descriptions are non-empty, issue is replaced with help-needed, announcement verification is 'verified', and the announcement body uses the final Chinese wording.
Verify the connect skill now (a) explains that AI can learn and retrieve from the DB, (b) teaches the verified-only announcement rule, and (c) uses the new board slug list.
Verify the admin skill now teaches operators to set verification=verified on announcements so AI will read them.
Verify the README still references the same set of board slugs and the same announcement rule.
